name: Tadalafil 40 mg improved exercise capacity and clinical worsening in PAH PHIRST
statement: In patients with pulmonary arterial hypertension, tadalafil 40 mg once daily for 16 weeks improved 6-minute walk distance, delayed clinical worsening, reduced clinical worsening incidence, and improved health-related quality of life, but this is PAH disease-treatment evidence rather than healthy cardiovascular prevention evidence.
population_or_context: Patients with idiopathic or associated pulmonary arterial hypertension, treatment-naive or on background bosentan.
quantitative_note: Tadalafil 40 mg produced a placebo-corrected 6MWD treatment effect of 33 m (95% CI 15 to 50), improved time to clinical worsening (P=0.041), and reduced clinical-worsening incidence by 68% relative risk reduction (P=0.038).

source_locator.quote_or_paraphrase_note: Abstract reports PHIRST dose-response, 6MWD effect, clinical worsening, quality of life, and common adverse events.

caveats: 40 mg daily dose differs from common ED/BPH low-dose daily exposure.
Does not establish benefit for systemic vascular health, blood pressure, or event prevention in healthy users.
population_profile: Patients with PAH; low directness for healthy men age 30 to 50.
tadalafil_exposure: Tadalafil 2.5, 10, 20, or 40 mg once daily for 16 weeks; 40 mg met the prespecified statistical threshold.
indication_context: PAH disease-treatment evidence; not healthy off-label prevention.
endpoint_measure: 6-minute walk distance, clinical worsening, WHO functional class, health-related quality of life, and adverse events.
effect_estimate: Placebo-corrected 6MWD +33 m; clinical worsening relative risk reduction 68%; WHO functional class change not statistically significant.
safety_findings: Most common treatment-related adverse events reported with tadalafil were headache, myalgia, and flushing.
directness_to_target_population: High for PAH, low for mostly healthy men age 30 to 50.
confounding_and_bias_limits: Disease-specific indication, background bosentan subgroup, high dose, and outcomes tied to PAH exercise limitation rather than general cardiovascular health.
class_transfer_limits: Direct tadalafil evidence, but indication and dose sharply limit transfer to healthy users.
